mapping_description:
pvenketa: This Mapping loads the data from STG to W table.
New type of Exceptions has been added as part of Q3FY15

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SCXME.EXCEPTION_ID  AS BK_EXCEPTION_ID_INT,
CASE WHEN SCXME.FLOW= 'F' THEN 'FORWARD' 
     WHEN SCXME.FLOW ='R' THEN 'REVERSE' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS FLOW_TYPE ,
CASE WHEN SCXME.EXCEPTION_TYPE  LIKE'%DF%' THEN 'DF' ELSE 'FLB'  END AS DF_OR_FLB_TYPE,
COALESCE(SCXME.RETRO_INVOICE_STATUS,'UNKNOWN') AS  RETRO_INVOICE_STATUS_CD ,
COALESCE(SCXME.RETRO_AMOUNT,0.0000000)  AS RETRO_USD_AMT ,
COALESCE(SCXME.RECEIVED_QTY,0.0000000)  AS SHIPPED_QTY  ,                 
SCXME.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS LAST_UPDATE_DTM ,
COALESCE(SCXME.FLB_COST,0.0000000)  AS  INVENTORY_ITEM_USD_COST ,
COALESCE(EFFV.DESCRIPTION,'UNKNOWN') AS ORIGINAL_EXCEPTION_TYPE_CD, 
COALESCE(EFFV.DESCRIPTION,'UNKNOWN') AS EXCEPTION_TYPE_CD ,
COALESCE(SCXME.EXCEPTION_STATUS,'UNKNOWN') AS EXCEPTION_STATUS_CD ,         
SCXME.CREATION_DATE AS CREATION_DTM ,
COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-997)   AS MAJOR_PRODUCT_KEY ,
COALESCE(NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY,-999)  AS INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY,
COALESCE(FNPL.PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-99995) AS PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
COALESCE(FNVIL.VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_KEY,-995)    AS VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_KEY,
COALESCE(RFNVIL.VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_KEY,-995)   AS RETRO_INVOICE_LINE_KEY,
    CASE WHEN SCXME.FLOW= 'F' THEN SCXME.SHIP_DATE ELSE  NULL  END AS RU_SHIPMENT_DTM ,
SCXME.SHIPMENT_NO AS RU_SHIPMENT_NUM ,
    CASE WHEN SCXME.FLOW= 'R' THEN SCXME.SHIP_DATE ELSE  NULL  END AS RU_RECEIVED_DTM ,
COALESCE(SCXME.RESOLVED_FLB_COST,0.0000000 )AS RU_RESOLVED_FLB_USD_COST ,
SCXME.FLB_QTY AS RU_FLB_QTY ,
COALESCE(NII.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY,-999) AS RU_FLB_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY ,
COALESCE(NII.ITEM_KEY,-997) AS RU_FLB_ITEM_KEY ,
COALESCE(SCXME.DF_FEE,0.0000000) AS RU_DRCT_FULFILMNT_FEE_USD_COST,
CAST (SCXME.RESOLUTION_DATE AS DATE) AS DV_RESOLUTION_DT,
SCXME.RESOLUTION_DATE AS RESOLUTION_DTM,
CASE    WHEN EFFV.DESCRIPTION ='Zero FLB Cost' THEN 'Zero Cost: Oracle writeback to Local Org did not process'
        WHEN EFFV.DESCRIPTION ='Cost Change Across Shipments' THEN 'Partial Shipment: Cost Change Across Shipments'
        WHEN EFFV.DESCRIPTION ='FLB Cost Writeback Issue' THEN 'Cost Mismatch: Oracle writeback to Local Org did not process'
        WHEN EFFV.DESCRIPTION ='Missing DF Fee' THEN 'DF Fee is not loaded'
        WHEN EFFV.DESCRIPTION ='Pay DF Fee (Reverse Flow)' THEN  'Pay DF Fee'
        WHEN EFFV.DESCRIPTION ='Pay Scrap (Reverse Flow)' THEN  'Pay Scrap'
        WHEN EFFV.DESCRIPTION ='No Approved FLB Cost' THEN COALESCE(SCXME.ATTRIBUTE5,'UNKNOWN')
		WHEN EFFV.DESCRIPTION ='DF Fee Mismatch' THEN 'DF Fee Discrepancy in C*Creation vs. ASN'
		/* pvenketa : 07/11/2014 added as part of Q3FY15 changes starts*/
       	WHEN EFFV.DESCRIPTION ='DF Fee Change Across Shipments' THEN 'Partial Shipment: DF Fee Change Across Shipments'
		WHEN EFFV.DESCRIPTION ='DF Fee Writeback Issue' THEN 'DF Fee Mismatch: Oracle writeback to Local Org did not process'
		WHEN EFFV.DESCRIPTION ='No Approved DF Fee' THEN COALESCE(SCXME.ATTRIBUTE5,'UNKNOWN')
		WHEN EFFV.DESCRIPTION ='Zero DF Fee' THEN 'DF Fee Zero Cost: Oracle writeback to Local Org did not process'
		/* pvenketa : 07/11/2014 added as part of Q3FY15 changes ends*/
ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END REASON_CD,
CASE    WHEN EFFV.DESCRIPTION ='Zero FLB Cost' THEN 'Zero Cost: Oracle writeback to Local Org did not process'
        WHEN EFFV.DESCRIPTION ='Cost Change Across Shipments' THEN 'Partial Shipment: Cost Change Across Shipments'
        WHEN EFFV.DESCRIPTION ='FLB Cost Writeback Issue' THEN 'Cost Mismatch: Oracle writeback to Local Org did not process'
        WHEN EFFV.DESCRIPTION ='Missing DF Fee' THEN 'DF Fee is not loaded'
        WHEN EFFV.DESCRIPTION ='Pay DF Fee (Reverse Flow)' THEN  'Pay DF Fee'
        WHEN EFFV.DESCRIPTION ='Pay Scrap (Reverse Flow)' THEN  'Pay Scrap'
        WHEN EFFV.DESCRIPTION ='No Approved FLB Cost' THEN COALESCE(SCXME.ATTRIBUTE5,'UNKNOWN')
        WHEN EFFV.DESCRIPTION ='DF Fee Mismatch' THEN 'DF Fee Discrepancy in C*Creation vs. ASN'
		/* pvenketa : 07/11/2014 added as part of Q3FY15 changes starts*/
		WHEN EFFV.DESCRIPTION ='DF Fee Change Across Shipments' THEN 'Partial Shipment: DF Fee Change Across Shipments'
		WHEN EFFV.DESCRIPTION ='DF Fee Writeback Issue' THEN 'DF Fee Mismatch: Oracle writeback to Local Org did not process'
		WHEN EFFV.DESCRIPTION ='No Approved DF Fee' THEN COALESCE(SCXME.ATTRIBUTE5,'UNKNOWN')
		WHEN EFFV.DESCRIPTION ='Zero DF Fee' THEN 'DF Fee Zero Cost: Oracle writeback to Local Org did not process'
		/* pvenketa : 07/11/2014 added as part of Q3FY15 changes ends*/
ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END INITIAL_REASON_CD,
SCXME.ACTION_CD AS ACTION_CODE,
CASE WHEN NRPCE.BK_EXCEPTION_ID_INT IS NULL THEN 'I' ELSE 'U' END DML_TYPE,
/* priyavij: 11/08/2015 added as a part of September QWIN retro Overhaul */
COALESCE(SCXME.RECEIPT_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN') AS RECEIPT_NUMBER, 
COALESCE(SCXME.RESOLVED_DF_FEE,0) AS  RESOLVED_DF_FEE,
SCXME.ASN_CREATION_DATE,
SCXME.ATTRIBUTE15 AS RU_FWD_REF_EXCEPTION_ID_INT
FROM 
(
SELECT EXCEPTION_ID,FLOW,EXCEPTION_TYPE,RETRO_INVOICE_STATUS,RETRO_AMOUNT,RECEIVED_QTY,LAST_UPDATE_DATE,FLB_COST,EXCEPTION_STATUS,CREATION_DATE,SHIPMENT_NO,
RESOLVED_FLB_COST,FLB_QTY,DF_FEE,ACTION_CD,ORG_CODE,MAJOR_PID,FLB,PO_LINE_NO,PO_NO,INVOICE_LINE,INVOICE_NO,RETRO_INVOICE_LINE,RETRO_INVOICE_NO,SHIP_DATE,ATTRIBUTE5,RESOLUTION_DATE,RECEIPT_NUMBER, RESOLVED_DF_FEE, ASN_CREATION_DATE,
CASE WHEN COALESCE(CAST(ATTRIBUTE15 AS INTEGER),0) > 0 THEN ATTRIBUTE15 ELSE -999 END ATTRIBUTE15
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_X_MK_EXCP_LOG_STG 
UNION ALL
SELECT EXCEPTION_ID,FLOW,EXCEPTION_TYPE,RETRO_INVOICE_STATUS,RETRO_AMOUNT,RECEIVED_QTY,LAST_UPDATE_DATE,FLB_COST,EXCEPTION_STATUS,CREATION_DATE,SHIPMENT_NO,
RESOLVED_FLB_COST,FLB_QTY,DF_FEE,ACTION_CD,ORG_CODE,MAJOR_PID,FLB,PO_LINE_NO,PO_NO,INVOICE_LINE,INVOICE_NO,RETRO_INVOICE_LINE,RETRO_INVOICE_NO,SHIP_DATE,ATTRIBUTE5,RESOLUTION_DATE,RECEIPT_NUMBER, RESOLVED_DF_FEE, ASN_CREATION_DATE,
CASE WHEN COALESCE(CAST(ATTRIBUTE15 AS INTEGER),0) > 0 THEN ATTRIBUTE15 ELSE -999 END ATTRIBUTE15
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_X_MK_EXCP_LOG_STG 
)SCXME

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO   
ON ( SCXME.ORG_CODE =  NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE  )
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT  NP
ON ( SCXME.MAJOR_PID = NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID )
LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NII
ON ( NII.BK_PRODUCT_ID = SCXME.FLB
AND NII.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY = NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY )
INNER JOIN(
SELECT A.FLEX_VALUE,C.DESCRIPTION FROM 
$$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_FLEX_VALUES A , $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_FND_FLEX_VALUE_SETS B,$$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_FLEX_VALUES_TL C
WHERE  A.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID = B.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID AND A.GLOBAL_NAME=B.GLOBAL_NAME
AND B.FLEX_VALUE_SET_NAME = 'XXSCM_RETRO_EXCEPTION_TYPE'
AND  A.FLEX_VALUE_ID = C.FLEX_VALUE_ID  AND A.GLOBAL_NAME=C.GLOBAL_NAME 
AND C.LANGUAGE1 = 'US'
)EFFV
ON EFFV.FLEX_VALUE=SCXME.EXCEPTION_TYPE
INNER JOIN (SELECT NPOL.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_NUM_INT  , NPO.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM , NPOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY               
                                                FROM    $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER  NPO
                                                INNER JOIN   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE NPOL
                                                ON ( NPO.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY = NPOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY) 
                                                WHERE NPO.SS_CD ='CG'
                                                GROUP BY NPOL.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_NUM_INT  , NPO.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM , NPOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY               
) FNPL
ON FNPL.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_NUM_INT = SCXME.PO_LINE_NO
AND FNPL.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM = SCXME.PO_NO
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT NVIL.SK_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_NUM_INT, NVI.BK_VENDOR_INVOICE_NUM , NVIL.VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_KEY
                                FROM   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INVOICE NVI
                                INNER JOIN   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE NVIL
                                ON ( NVI.VENDOR_INVOICE_KEY = NVIL.VENDOR_INVOICE_KEY) 
                                WHERE NVI.SS_CD ='CG'
                                GROUP BY NVIL.SK_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_NUM_INT, NVI.BK_VENDOR_INVOICE_NUM , NVIL.VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_KEY
                                )  FNVIL
ON ( FNVIL.SK_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_NUM_INT = cast(SCXME.INVOICE_LINE as decimal (26,7))
AND FNVIL.BK_VENDOR_INVOICE_NUM = SCXME.INVOICE_NO )
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT NVIL.SK_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_NUM_INT, NVI.BK_VENDOR_INVOICE_NUM , NVIL.VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_KEY
                                FROM   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INVOICE NVI
                                INNER JOIN   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE NVIL
                                ON ( NVI.VENDOR_INVOICE_KEY = NVIL.VENDOR_INVOICE_KEY) 
                                WHERE NVI.SS_CD ='CG'
                                GROUP BY NVIL.SK_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_NUM_INT, NVI.BK_VENDOR_INVOICE_NUM , NVIL.VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_KEY
                                )  RFNVIL
ON ( RFNVIL.SK_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_NUM_INT = SCXME.RETRO_INVOICE_LINE
AND RFNVIL.BK_VENDOR_INVOICE_NUM = SCXME.RETRO_INVOICE_NO )
/* priyavij: 11/08/2015 added as a part of September QWIN retro Overhaul */
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_RETRO_PAYMENT_COST_EXCEPTION NRPCE
ON SCXME.EXCEPTION_ID  =NRPCE.BK_EXCEPTION_ID_INT

SELECT
SCXME.EXCEPTION_ID,
SCXME.ORG_CODE,
SCXME.MAJOR_PID,
SCXME.FLB,
SCXME.PO_NO,
SCXME.PO_LINE_NO,
SCXME.SHIP_DATE,
SCXME.SHIPMENT_NO,
SCXME.RECEIVED_QTY,
SCXME.FLB_QTY,
SCXME.FLB_COST,
SCXME.EXCEPTION_TYPE,
SCXME.DF_FEE,
SCXME.EXCEPTION_STATUS,
SCXME.INVOICE_NO,
SCXME.INVOICE_LINE,
SCXME.RETRO_AMOUNT,
SCXME.RETRO_INVOICE_STATUS,
SCXME.RETRO_INVOICE_NO,
SCXME.RETRO_INVOICE_LINE,
SCXME.FLOW,
SCXME.ATTRIBUTE1,
SCXME.ATTRIBUTE2,
SCXME.ATTRIBUTE3,
SCXME.ATTRIBUTE4,
SCXME.ATTRIBUTE5,
SCXME.ATTRIBUTE6,
SCXME.ATTRIBUTE7,
SCXME.ATTRIBUTE8,
SCXME.ATTRIBUTE9,
SCXME.ATTRIBUTE10,
SCXME.ATTRIBUTE11,
SCXME.ATTRIBUTE12,
SCXME.ATTRIBUTE13,
SCXME.ATTRIBUTE14,
SCXME.ATTRIBUTE15,
SCXME.REQUEST_ID,
SCXME.CREATION_DATE,
SCXME.CREATED_BY,
SCXME.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
SCXME.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
SCXME.UOM,
SCXME.COMMENTS,
SCXME.RESOLVED_FLB_COST,
SCXME.RESOLUTION_DATE,
SCXME.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
SCXME.GLOBAL_NAME,
SCXME.BATCH_ID,
SCXME.CREATE_DATETIME,
SCXME.ACTION_CD,
/* priyavij: 11/08/2015 added as a part of September QWIN retro Overhaul */
SCXME.RECEIPT_NUMBER,
SCXME.RESOLVED_DF_FEE,
SCXME.ASN_CREATION_DATE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_X_MK_EXCP_LOG_STG SCXME
WHERE
NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM ( SELECT NVIL.SK_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_NUM_INT, NVI.BK_VENDOR_INVOICE_NUM , NVIL.VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_KEY
                                FROM   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INVOICE NVI
                                INNER JOIN   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE NVIL
                                ON ( NVI.VENDOR_INVOICE_KEY = NVIL.VENDOR_INVOICE_KEY) 
                                WHERE NVI.SS_CD ='CG'
                                GROUP BY NVIL.SK_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_NUM_INT, NVI.BK_VENDOR_INVOICE_NUM , NVIL.VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_KEY
                                )  FNVIL
WHERE  ( FNVIL.SK_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_NUM_INT = cast(SCXME.INVOICE_LINE as decimal (26,7))
AND FNVIL.BK_VENDOR_INVOICE_NUM = SCXME.INVOICE_NO )
)
OR NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO 
WHERE  SCXME.ORG_CODE =  NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE 
)
OR NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT NPOL.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_NUM_INT  , NPO.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM , NPOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY               
                                                FROM    $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER  NPO
                                                INNER JOIN   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE NPOL
                                                ON ( NPO.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY = NPOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY) 
                                                WHERE NPO.SS_CD ='CG'
                                                GROUP BY NPOL.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_NUM_INT  , NPO.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM , NPOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY               
) FNPL
WHERE  FNPL.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_NUM_INT = SCXME.PO_LINE_NO
AND FNPL.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM = SCXME.PO_NO 
)
OR NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP       
WHERE SCXME.MAJOR_PID = NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID 
)
OR NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM (
SELECT A.FLEX_VALUE,B.DESCRIPTION FROM 
$$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_FLEX_VALUES A , $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_FND_FLEX_VALUE_SETS B
WHERE  A.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID = B.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID AND B.FLEX_VALUE_SET_NAME LIKE  'XXSCM%RETRO%') EFFV
WHERE EFFV.FLEX_VALUE=SCXME.EXCEPTION_TYPE
)
OR NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT NVIL.SK_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_NUM_INT, NVI.BK_VENDOR_INVOICE_NUM , NVIL.VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_KEY
                                FROM   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INVOICE NVI
                                INNER JOIN   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE NVIL
                                ON ( NVI.VENDOR_INVOICE_KEY = NVIL.VENDOR_INVOICE_KEY) 
                                WHERE NVI.SS_CD ='CG'
                                GROUP BY NVIL.SK_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_NUM_INT, NVI.BK_VENDOR_INVOICE_NUM , NVIL.VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_KEY
                                )  RFNVIL
WHERE RFNVIL.SK_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_NUM_INT = SCXME.RETRO_INVOICE_LINE
AND RFNVIL.BK_VENDOR_INVOICE_NUM = SCXME.RETRO_INVOICE_NO )
